Klasse DeviceResource

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.resource.DeviceResource
@ApplicationScoped @Path("/api/devices") @Produces("application/json") @Consumes("application/json") public class DeviceResource extends Object
REST resource for device management (FR-04, FR-05, FR-06, FR-07). Devices are scoped under rooms for creation and listing.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    DeviceResource()
    Creates the resource; intended for CDI instantiation.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    delete(Long id)
    Removes a device from a room (FR-05).
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    getById(Long id)
    Returns a single device including its current state (FR-07).
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    rename(Long id, @Valid DeviceRenameRequest request)
    Renames an existing device (FR-05).
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    updateState(Long id, @Valid DeviceStateRequest request)
    Manually controls a device's state and records an activity log entry (FR-06, FR-08).

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • DeviceResource

      public DeviceResource()
      Creates the resource; intended for CDI instantiation.

  • Methodendetails

    • getById

      @GET @Path("/{id}") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response getById(@PathParam("id") Long id)
      Returns a single device including its current state (FR-07).
      Parameter:
      id - the device ID
      Gibt zurück:
      the device or 404

    • rename

      @PUT @Path("/{id}/rename") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response rename(@PathParam("id") Long id, @Valid @Valid DeviceRenameRequest request)
      Renames an existing device (FR-05).
      Parameter:
      id - the device ID
      request - the new name
      Gibt zurück:
      200 with the updated device

    • delete

      @DELETE @Path("/{id}") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response delete(@PathParam("id") Long id)
      Removes a device from a room (FR-05). Related activity logs and energy logs are removed via DB cascade.
      Parameter:
      id - the device ID
      Gibt zurück:
      204 on success

    • updateState

      @PUT @Path("/{id}/state") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response updateState(@PathParam("id") Long id, @Valid @Valid DeviceStateRequest request)
      Manually controls a device's state and records an activity log entry (FR-06, FR-08). Supported state changes depend on the device type:
      • SWITCH: set switchedOn
      • DIMMER: set level (0–100 %)
      • THERMOSTAT: set level (target °C)
      • SENSOR: set level (sensor reading)
      • BLIND: set level (0 = closed, 100 = open)
      Parameter:
      id - the device ID
      request - the new state and the actor
      Gibt zurück:
      200 with the updated device
